facebook.caption: POV: you skipped the resort shuttle and ended up in Rạch Hàm, Phú Quốc instead. Real fishing boats. Crab pots stacked to the roof. Locals who actually live here. Ham Ninh is what most tourists drive straight past on the way to the beach. 1,030 people rated it 4.1 stars. Most of them found it by accident. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Fishing boats rocking at the dock, crab traps everywhere, zero resort energy. This is Ham Ninh and it looks nothing like your Phu Quoc feed.

instagram.caption:
Took a wrong turn. Found Ham Ninh. Real boats, real fishing town, zero crowds.

Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: No resorts. No beach clubs. Just Ham Ninh doing what it's always done.

tiktok.caption: Skipped the beach. Ended up in Ham Ninh fishing town. Worth every wrong turn. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #TravelTips #PhuQuocTips
